PowerShell(wsl -d Ubuntu-26.04 -u eugine -- bash -lc 'echo "user=$\(whoami\) uid=$\(id -u\)"; echo "--- tools ---"; for t in git curl node npm pnpm docker; do printf "%-7s: " "$t"; if command -v $t >/dev/null 2>&1; then $t --version 2>&1 | head -1; else echo MISSING; fi; done; echo "--- docker daemon ---"; docker info >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo "docker OK \(WSL integration on\)" || echo "docker NOT reachable - enable WSL integration in Docker Desktop"')

PowerShell(wsl -d Ubuntu-26.04 -u eugine -- bash -lc 'echo "PATH=$PATH"; echo "npm -> $\(command -v npm\)"; echo "node -> $\(command -v node || echo none\)"; echo "nvm dir: $NVM_DIR"; ls -la ~/.nvm 2>/dev/null | head -3; ls -la ~/.local/share/fnm 2>/dev/null | head -3')

PowerShell(wsl -d Ubuntu-26.04 -u root -- bash -c 'echo "=== apt update ==="; apt-get update 2>&1 | tail -5; echo "=== NodeSource setup ==="; curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_22.x | bash - 2>&1 | tail -15')

PowerShell(wsl -d Ubuntu-26.04 -u root -- bash -c 'DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y nodejs 2>&1 | tail -3; echo "node: $\(node --version 2>&1\)"; echo "npm: $\(npm --version 2>&1\)"; npm install -g @devcontainers/cli 2>&1 | tail -2; echo "devcontainer: $\(devcontainer --version 2>&1\)"')
PowerShell(wsl -d Ubuntu-26.04 -u root -- bash -c 'command -v rsync >/dev/null 2>&1 || DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y rsync >/dev/null 2>&1; rsync --version | head -1')

PowerShell(wsl -d Ubuntu-26.04 -u eugine -- bash -c 'rsync -a --delete --info=stats2 --exclude node_modules --exclude .next --exclude dist --exclude .turbo --exclude .venv --exclude __pycache__ --exclude coverage --exclude .pytest_cache --exclude .ruff_cache "/mnt/c/Users/eugin/OneDrive/DEV/grenmet/" "$HOME/grenmet/" 2>&1 | tail -8; echo "--- verify ---"; echo "size: $\(du -sh $HOME/grenmet | cut -f1\)"; echo "branch: $\(git -C $HOME/grenmet rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD\)"; echo "changed files vs HEAD: $\(git -C $HOME/grenmet status --porcelain | wc -l\)"')
